armies.name: Vigilant Brotherhood
armies.tagline: Ruination-chamber elite from Skaventide / Ultimate Starter Set
armies.playstyle: Prosecutors flank at speed while Liberators hold objectives. Holy Orders offers a run-and-charge trick and a once-per-battle Ward (5+).

battleTraits.name: Storm Charge
battleTraits.summary: Pick a unit not in combat; it may use Charge abilities this turn even if it used a Run ability.
battleTraits.timing: Once per battle, Your Charge Phase

battleTraits.name: Shield of Azyr
battleTraits.summary: Pick a friendly unit; it has Ward (5+) until the start of your next turn.
battleTraits.timing: Once per battle, Your Hero Phase

regimentAbilities.name: Strike Where Needed
regimentAbilities.summary: When a unit uses Retreat, it takes no mortal damage and may still use Charge abilities this turn.
regimentAbilities.newPlayerHint: Good when you want mobile Prosecutors or hit-and-run Liberators.
regimentAbilities.timing: Once per battle, reaction to Retreat

regimentAbilities.name: Blaze of Glory
regimentAbilities.summary: Pick a unit in combat; when its models are slain, roll D6 per slain model — on 4+ inflict 1 mortal on an enemy in combat with that unit.
regimentAbilities.newPlayerHint: Good when you expect your infantry to trade on an objective.
regimentAbilities.timing: Once per battle, Any Combat Phase

enhancements.name: Hallowed Scrolls
enhancements.summary: Your general has Ward (5+).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Safest pick — keeps your Lord-Vigilant alive longer.

enhancements.name: Morrda's Talon
enhancements.summary: Your general's Hallowed Greataxe has Crit (Mortal).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Aggressive pick if you plan to seek combat with your general.

enhancements.name: Quicksilver Draught
enhancements.summary: Your general has Strike-first this phase.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Save for a decisive combat phase when you need to strike first.
enhancements.timing: Once per battle, Any Combat Phase

enhancements.name: Null Pendant
enhancements.summary: Roll for each enemy contesting the same objective as your general; on 2+ subtract the roll from their control score this turn.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Objective play — use when contesting a key point late game.
enhancements.timing: Once per battle, End of Any Turn

armies.name: Yndrasta's Spearhead
armies.tagline: Lightning-strike force from the original AoS starter set
armies.playstyle: Yndrasta and Annihilators arrive from round 3. Vanquishers and a Stormstrike Chariot hit first; Yndrasta finishes the biggest threats.

battleTraits.name: Lightning-Strike Arrival
battleTraits.summary: Yndrasta and Annihilators are not deployed. From battle round 3, set them up anywhere more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: Drive Them Back
regimentAbilities.summary: Pick units contesting an objective and in combat; each can pile-in, then roll D6 per adjacent enemy — on 4+ inflict 1 mortal.
regimentAbilities.timing: Once per battle, Your Movement Phase

regimentAbilities.name: Defend to the Last
regimentAbilities.summary: Friendly units have Ward (6+) while contesting an objective you control.

enhancements.name: The Prime Huntress
enhancements.summary: Thengavar has Damage 2D6 against Monster targets.

enhancements.name: Dazzling Radiance
enhancements.summary: If your general was set up this phase, return 1 slain model to each friendly unit wholly within 12" of them.
enhancements.timing: Once per battle, Your Movement Phase

enhancements.name: Strike with the Tempest's Rage
enhancements.summary: Your general has Strike-first if they charged this turn.

enhancements.name: Hawk of the Celestial Skies
enhancements.summary: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly units wholly within 12" of your general this phase.
enhancements.timing: Once per battle, End of Any Turn

armies.name: Gnawfeast Clawpack
armies.tagline: Swarm melee from Skaventide / Ultimate Starter Set
armies.playstyle: Tunnel reserves and Gnawhole Ambush threaten the back line. Clanrats swarm objectives while Rat Ogors and heroes deliver the killing blow.

battleTraits.name: The Lurking Vermintide
battleTraits.summary: Pick an undeployed unit; it starts in the tunnels below. Units still there after round 3 without using Gnawhole Ambush are destroyed.

battleTraits.name: Gnawhole Ambush
battleTraits.summary: Pick a unit in the tunnels below; set it up within 6" of a battlefield corner and more than 9" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: Warpstone-Laced Bullets
regimentAbilities.summary: Pick a friendly unit's ranged weapon; it has Crit (Mortal) this phase.
regimentAbilities.newPlayerHint: Best with Warlock Engineer or ranged attacks before a charge.
regimentAbilities.timing: Once per battle, Your Shooting Phase

regimentAbilities.name: Too Quick to Hit-Hit
regimentAbilities.summary: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units when they use Retreat abilities.
regimentAbilities.newPlayerHint: Reliable pick — Clanrats can retreat from trouble without losing models.

enhancements.name: Lead the Seething Horde
enhancements.summary: When using Call for Reinforcements, the replacement unit can be set up wholly within 13" of your general and not in combat.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Pairs well with Clanrats — bring reinforcements closer to the fight.

enhancements.name: Warpstone Charm
enhancements.summary: Subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units in combat with your general.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Aggressive — your Clawlord wants to be in melee.

enhancements.name: Skryre Connections
enhancements.summary: Your general's Ratling Pistol has Attacks 2D6 instead of D6.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: More shots from the Clawlord's pistol — risky but fun.

enhancements.name: Cloak of Stitched Victories
enhancements.summary: Your general has Ward (5+).

armies.name: Warpspark Clawpack
armies.playstyle: Clanrats screen for Stormfiends and a Warp Lightning Cannon. Always Three Clawsteps Ahead lets you reposition in the enemy movement phase.

battleTraits.name: Always Three Clawsteps Ahead
battleTraits.summary: Pick a friendly unit not in combat; it can use Normal Move as if it were your movement phase.
battleTraits.timing: Once per phase, Enemy Movement Phase

regimentAbilities.name: Warpstone-Laced Armour
regimentAbilities.summary: When an attack targets your Stormfiends, they have Ward (5+) for the rest of the turn.
regimentAbilities.timing: Once per battle, reaction to attack on Stormfiends

regimentAbilities.name: Endless Swarm of Rats
regimentAbilities.summary: When Clanrats use Seething Swarm, return D6 slain models instead of D3.

enhancements.name: Skilled Manipulator
enhancements.summary: Your general has Ward (4+) while within 1" of any friendly Clanrats units.

enhancements.name: Cage of Warp Lightning
enhancements.summary: Pick an enemy within 6" and roll: on 2+ they have Strike-last; on 1 inflict 1 mortal on your general.
enhancements.timing: Once per battle, Any Combat Phase

enhancements.name: Skitterleap
enhancements.summary: Casting roll 2D6; on 6+ remove your general and set up more than 6" from enemies. Cannot move next movement phase.

enhancements.name: Scurry Away
enhancements.summary: Roll a dice; on 3+ your general may Retreat immediately with no mortal damage.

armies.name: Crixxit's Kill-Pack
armies.playstyle: Glass cannon with teleporting heroes and reinforced infantry. Fragile but explosive.

battleTraits.name: Cloaked In Shadow
battleTraits.summary: By the time enemies have uncovered a band of Skaven assassins, the ratmen are already in place to strike

regimentAbilities.name: Way Of The Skittering Shade
regimentAbilities.summary: It is said that a soul marked for death is never more than a few feet from lurking Eshin agents

regimentAbilities.name: Way Of The Fiendish Claw
regimentAbilities.summary: Veteran Deathmasters are experts in many wicked martial arts that harness their natural twitchy agility

enhancements.name: Murderous Acrobatics
enhancements.summary: Glowing eyes locked on his target, Crixxit deftly weaves past and leaps across any who would impede him. Effect: When your general uses the ‘ Charge ’ ability, they can pass through enemy models

enhancements.name: Just Another Shadow
enhancements.summary: Crixxit is adept at stalking unseen until the moment to strike arrives. Effect: While your general is wholly within the combat range of a friendly unit that has 3 or more models, your general has WARD ( 4+ )

enhancements.name: Master Of Shadows
enhancements.summary: Swathed in darkness, Crixxit can slip in and out of the gloom with ease, his victims’ cooling corpses the only sign of his passing. Effect: When your general uses the ‘ Cloaked in Shadow ’ ability, add 1 to the shadow-travel roll

enhancements.name: Death Screech
enhancements.summary: When needs must, Crixxit can unleash a deafening screech to stun foes

armies.name: Castelite Company
armies.playstyle: Sturdy infantry lines with solid saves. Dependable but slower to close games.

battleTraits.name: The Officar'S Order
battleTraits.summary: Reading the flow of battle, a ranking Freeguilder dispatches an order that could well turn the tide in the Sigmarites’ favour

regimentAbilities.name: Charge!
regimentAbilities.summary: With their blade raised high, the Marshal signals the charge of the Cavaliers. Effect: Friendly CAVALRY units have STRIKE-FIRST if they charged in the same turn

regimentAbilities.name: Ironweld Discipline
regimentAbilities.summary: With nerves of steel, the crew of the Great Cannon prepare to fire even as enemies close in on all sides

enhancements.name: Flask Of Lethisian Darkwater
enhancements.summary: Sourced from the lakewaters of the city of Lethis, when this potion is carefully sipped, its black liquid soothes the body and soul. Effect: Heal (D6) your general

enhancements.name: Brazier Of Holy Flame
enhancements.summary: The torch borne by this champion symbolises the light of civilisation being carried forth into the darkness of the wilds, a sacred act that emboldens those who march alongside them

enhancements.name: Heirloom Blade
enhancements.summary: Wielded in countless battles, the edge of this blade is as keen as the day it was forged. Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s Master-forged Longsword

enhancements.name: Glimmering
enhancements.summary: The glinting facets of this tiny fragment of Mallus offer fleeting glimpses of the future. Effect: Each phase, you can re-roll 1 hit roll , or 1 wound roll , or 1 save roll made for your general

armies.name: Fusil Platoon
armies.playstyle: Strong shooting with limited frontline durability. Controls space from range.
roster: 5 Freeguild Fusiliers with 1 Blackpowder Squire token

battleTraits.name: Fortify Position
battleTraits.summary: Heavy pavises are slammed into the dirt, forming a wall of oak and iron as strong as a fortification. Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly CASTELITE units if they did not use a MOVE ability in the same turn

regimentAbilities.name: Well Provisioned
regimentAbilities.summary: This brigade has a quartermaster well versed in the art of keeping their troops, healthy, hale and supplied with plenty of arrows and blackpowder

regimentAbilities.name: Respected Leader
regimentAbilities.summary: On occasion, a brigade will attract more Wildercorps Hunters than normal, as word reaches their ears of a commander worthy of their loyalty. Effect: Friendly Wildercorps Hunters units gain the REINFORCEMENTS keyword

enhancements.name: Adept Tactician
enhancements.summary: Assembling reinforcements into ad-hoe regiments is the hallmark of a seasoned, if a somewhat desperate, general

enhancements.name: Brace!
enhancements.summary: With a keen eye for incoming attacks, this Ogor Warhulk is adept at rebuffing any and all threats made towards the Fusil-Major riding atop its gun platform. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 5+ )

enhancements.name: Shield Bash
enhancements.summary: With a bellow, the Ogor Warhulk drives their shield forward, forcing the enemy back

armies.name: Sentinel's of Embergard
armies.general: Jorvan Kreel, Heir of the Kraken
armies.playstyle: Positioning-heavy synergies. Gallants hit hard with setup but the army is fragile.
roster: Jorvan Kreel, Heir of the Kraken

battleTraits.name: Ranger Doctrines
battleTraits.summary: Kreel was once a captain in the Wildercorps. While he now commands an eclectic assortment of forces, the fluid tactics he honed in his prior life can still be used to great effect. Used By: The unit using that FIGHT ability Effect: Immediately after that FIGHT ability has been resolved, pick a point on the battlefield

regimentAbilities.name: Close-Quarters Drill
regimentAbilities.summary: Kreel has trained his Grenadiers to hold their fire until it can be unloaded right in their foes’ faces. Effect: Friendly units’ ranged weapons have Shoot in Combat but you must subtract 1 from hit rolls for their shooting attacks while they are in combat

regimentAbilities.name: Blaggards!
regimentAbilities.summary: Though their city lies in ruin, these warriors defy any enemy who tries to prise the wreckage from them. Effect: Add 5 to the control scores of friendly non- HERO units while they are in combat with any enemy units that have 6 or more models or a Health characteristic of 3 or more

enhancements.name: Throwing Knives
enhancements.summary: Jorvan Kreel has, over the course of his adventures, acquired an assortment of deadly blades ready to be hurled into a chest, stomach or skull

enhancements.name: Hot-Blooded Endurance
enhancements.summary: A lifetime spent in the wilderness has left Kreel an indefatigable warrior. Effect: Your general can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn and no mortal damage is inflicted on them by RETREAT abilities

enhancements.name: Trained Ranger
enhancements.summary: The pathfinding skills he picked up in the jungles of the Charrwind Coast serve Kreel well in Embergard’s urban sprawl

enhancements.name: Blade Of The Kraken
enhancements.summary: In a decisive moment, Kreel fights ferociously to avenge Embergard’s fall – and also to maintain his warrior reputation… Effect: Double the Attacks characteristic of your general’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn

armies.name: Zenestra's Zealots
armies.general: Freeguild Marshal and Relic Envoy (The Relic Envoy is a token)
armies.playstyle: Fixed box-set roster. Pick regiment ability and general enhancement during guided match setup.
roster: Freeguild Marshal and Relic Envoy (The Relic Envoy is a token)
Pontifex Zenestra, Matriarch of the Great Wheel
1 Freeguild Command Corps Arch-Knight and Retinue

battleTraits.name: Sudden Ambush
battleTraits.summary: The Whisperblade hides until it is the perfect moment to strike. Effect: Set up this unit within 6" of an enemy unit and not in combat

battleTraits.name: Lady Of The Wheel
battleTraits.summary: Zenestra’s followers will defend her with a strength that can cow even a follower of the Dark Gods. Effect: Each time a friendly model is slain by a combat attack, roll a number of dice equal to that model’s Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the FIGHT ability has be

regimentAbilities.name: Fervent Rush
regimentAbilities.summary: Singing righteous hymns and prepared to give their lives for the cause, these Sigmarites charge forward to battle

regimentAbilities.name: Fierce Zealots
regimentAbilities.summary: Should Zenestra demand it, these followers will fight tooth and nail for even the meanest patch of dirt. Effect: Add 3 to the control scores of friendly Freeguild Steelhelms units

enhancements.name: Devout Commander
enhancements.summary: This faithful commander strikes with a ferocity born of utter conviction. Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and the Rend characteristic of your general’s Master-forged Weapon

enhancements.name: Comrades
enhancements.summary: The general calls upon their soldiers to hold the line, no matter the cost and no matter the foe

enhancements.name: Step To It!
enhancements.summary: The Marshal tells their men to heft their weapons and get moving! Effect: Do not make a run roll as part of that RUN ability. Instead, add 6" to that non- HERO unit’s Move characteristic to determine the distance each model in that unit can move as part of that RUN ability

enhancements.name: Ardent Demand
enhancements.summary: With a bellowed order, the Marshal ignites the passion and fury of the Freeguilders, and they lay into the enemy furiously

armies.name: Heartflayer Troupe
armies.playstyle: Strike first, hit hard, die fast. Aggressive and unforgiving.

battleTraits.name: Round Ability 1 Quickening Bloodlust
battleTraits.summary: The Khainites’ hearts beat harder and their strides lengthen in anticipation of battle. Effect: Add 1 to run rolls for this unit. 2 HEADLONG FURY: Reciting the catechism of Crimson Hate, the Khainites rush ahead in their eagerness to slaughter. Effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit. 3 ZEALOT’S RAGE: The faithful

regimentAbilities.name: Murderous Epiphany
regimentAbilities.summary: The Khainites are struck by a terrible vision of the Bloody-Handed God that drives their zeal to ever greater heights. Effect: All friendly units gain the Blood Rites passive ability they would have gained at the start of the next battle round (they keep this ability for the rest of the battle, but they do not gain it

regimentAbilities.name: Blessing Of Khaine
regimentAbilities.summary: Sacred rites have been performed on this Melusai Ironscale by the priestesses of the temple, and it is said that she can bestow the blessing of Khaine upon her sisters in battle

enhancements.name: Bathed In Blood
enhancements.summary: Your general draws vigour from the gore that splatters over her in battle. Effect: Each time a model is slain by your general, Heal (1) your general

enhancements.name: Flask Of Shademist
enhancements.summary: Filled with an obscuring mist harvested from the Ulguan coast, when this flask is shattered, the battlefield is plunged into darkness. Effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of your general

enhancements.name: Fuelled By Revenge
enhancements.summary: This general inspires a wrathful lust for vengeance in her Scáthborn kin. Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Blood Stalkers units while they are wholly within 12" of your general

enhancements.name: Zealous Orator
enhancements.summary: Your general is a wild demagogue who inspires her followers to fight on in the face of impossible odds

armies.name: Khainite Shadow Coven
armies.general: Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood
armies.playstyle: Many units, movement tricks, and defensive manipulation. High skill ceiling.
roster: Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood

battleTraits.name: Shadowmasked
battleTraits.summary: The umbral arts of the Khainite Shadowstalkers and the gore-smoke of the Cauldron are utilised to mask the movements of the Shadow Coven

regimentAbilities.name: Bleed Them Pale
regimentAbilities.summary: These aelves delight in bleeding their enemies slowly, darting away before they are attacked in turn

regimentAbilities.name: Murderous Strike
regimentAbilities.summary: A Shadow Coven attacks without warning, seeking to cripple the enemy with the cruelty of their opening strike. Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly INFANTRY units that charged in the same turn

enhancements.name: Shadow Avatar
enhancements.summary: The shadow of the Avatar of Khaine peels away and attacks the foe, every strike cleaving through both body and soul. Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn

enhancements.name: Boiling Blood
enhancements.summary: A torrent of scalding blood is vomited forth by the Avatar of Khaine, reducing even polished sigmarite to molten slag

enhancements.name: Frenzied Exhortations
enhancements.summary: The Slaughter Queen atop the Cauldron of Blood howls a bloody liturgy that empowers nearby cultists

enhancements.name: Bladed Impact
enhancements.summary: The bladed carriage of a Cauldron of Blood can plough its way through enemy ranks with ease

armies.name: Saga Axeband
armies.playstyle: Headlong charges and Awaken the Runes. Surprisingly durable despite low saves.

battleTraits.name: Awaken The Runes
battleTraits.summary: In battle, a Fyreslayer’s ur-gold runes are awakened, filling them with the blazing power of Grimnir

regimentAbilities.name: Magmic Tunnels
regimentAbilities.summary: Tunnels carved by runic magic enable a band of Fyreslayers to attack from an unseen quarter. Effect: Pick up to 2 friendly units. Remove them from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

regimentAbilities.name: Fyresteel Throwing Axes
regimentAbilities.summary: These sidearms are deadly when hurled at close range

enhancements.name: Too Stubborn To Die
enhancements.summary: Long in the beard, your general shrugs off wounds that would fell a lesser duardin. Effect: Heal (D3) your general

enhancements.name: Horn Of Grimnir
enhancements.summary: Inlaid with powerful runes of ur-gold, a blast from this horn inspires those bloody and bruised to continue the fight

enhancements.name: Spirit Of Grimnir
enhancements.summary: The very presence of your general sets ur-gold ablaze. Effect: You can re-roll activation rolls you make for the ‘Ur-gold Runes’ ability (see Battle Traits )

enhancements.name: Powerful Presence
enhancements.summary: With a roaring voice and mighty displays of strength, your general is an imposing figure upon the battlefield. Effect: Add 3 to your general’s control score

armies.name: Skyhammer Task Force
armies.playstyle: Positioning and precision fire. Controls the board from range.
roster: 5 Arkanaut Company (incl. Light Skyhook and Aethermatic Volley Gun)

battleTraits.name: Ply The Skies
battleTraits.summary: The Kharadron rule the skies of the realms with fleets of fearsome airships crewed by hardened duardin. Used By: The Arkanaut Frigate that is using that MOVE ability. Effect: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit that is wholly within the combat range of that Arkanaut Frigate and not in combat to be transported . Remove that I

regimentAbilities.name: Assault Boat
regimentAbilities.summary: The speed and manoeuvrability of the Arkanaut Frigate allows it to deliver Arkanaut Companies directly into the fray

regimentAbilities.name: Disengage
regimentAbilities.summary: At an officer’s command, the vessel disengages with all guns blazing

enhancements.name: Masterwrought Armour
enhancements.summary: This Admiral’s finely crafted suit of armour is the acme of the armourer’s art. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 6+ )

enhancements.name: There'S No Reward Without Risk
enhancements.summary: Under the command of their Admiral, the crew close in on their prize without a moment’s hesitation. Effect: You can re-roll the charge roll for that CHARGE ability

enhancements.name: Flask Of Vintage Gorogna
enhancements.summary: This rare duardin drink is said to be good for whatever ails you. Effect: Heal (D6) your general

enhancements.name: Leave No Duardin Behind
enhancements.summary: With a rousing speech, the Admiral rallies his crew and steels their resolve

armies.name: Grundstok Trailblazers
armies.playstyle: Flying 3+ saves, Endrinrigger reinforcements, and a dominant general.

battleTraits.name: Gunhauler Escort
battleTraits.summary: The threatening presence of a Grundstok Gunhauler overhead makes it difficult for enemies to focus their attacks on the Trailblazers’ ground forces. Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly KHARADRON OVERLORDS INFANTRY units while they are wholly within 6" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler

regimentAbilities.name: Rapid Relocation
regimentAbilities.summary: The Gunhauler’s pilot assumes a high trajectory before looping around and rejoining the battle from a different direction

regimentAbilities.name: Propeller Downdraught
regimentAbilities.summary: The buffeting air currents kicked up by the Gunhauler as it flies low mean that nearby foes seeking to engage the Kharadron find themselves charging into a headwind. Effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 9" of a friendly Grundstok Gunhauler

enhancements.name: Emergency Fuel Injection Pods
enhancements.summary: By flicking a rune-embossed switch concealed in their suit, this Endrinmaster can give their equipment a boost just when they need it. Effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST for the rest of the turn

enhancements.name: Celestium-Burst Bomblets
enhancements.summary: Long-standing trade agreements with Azyrheim have allowed the production of these munitions, which have a disruptive effect on supernatural defences

enhancements.name: Prospector And Pioneer
enhancements.summary: Whether they are a cranky taskmaster or a charismatic maverick, this general is a force of nature when it comes to staking new claims for their sky-port. Effect: Add 2 to your general’s control score

enhancements.name: Extraction Fail-Safes
enhancements.summary: This Endrinmaster has fitted their Dirigible Suit with non-essential components that can be jettisoned to distract a pursuing foe. Effect: Subtract 1 from the number of damage points inflicted on this unit when it uses a RETREAT ability

armies.name: Soulraid Hunt
armies.playstyle: Excellent mobility and burst damage. One of the most dangerous Spearheads.

battleTraits.name: Round Ability 1 Low Tide
battleTraits.summary: The Idoneth move towards the foe, their appearance eerily refracted and distorted. Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit. 2 FLOOD TIDE: The Idoneth attack suddenly, swirling around the foe and trapping the unwary. Effect: This unit can use a RUN ability and still use SHOOT and/or

regimentAbilities.name: Way Of The Cresting Wave
regimentAbilities.summary: The Thralls of this raiding party have been trained in techniques that see them strike like a tsunami. Effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly Namarti Thralls units that charged in the same turn

regimentAbilities.name: Ethersea Predators
regimentAbilities.summary: The deep-sea beasts these warriors ride are driven into a feeding frenzy during battle. Effect: Pick a friendly CAVALRY unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn. Heal (D3) that unit

enhancements.name: Arch-Ritualist
enhancements.summary: This general is a master at manipulating the ethersea to conceal the approach of their forces. Effect: Add 1 to rolls for your general’s ‘Ritual of the Creeping Mist’ ability

enhancements.name: Mind Flare
enhancements.summary: A brilliant pulse of bioluminescence suddenly illuminates the gloom of the ethersea, temporarily blinding those unprepared for it

enhancements.name: Steelshell Armour
enhancements.summary: This pearlescent armour offers uncanny protection, regardless of the strength behind the blows that strike it. Effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for your general (positive and negative)

enhancements.name: Delicious Morsels
enhancements.summary: This general carries with them rare crustaceans favoured by Allopexes and Fangmora Eels. Effect: Heal (1) each friendly CAVALRY unit within your general’s combat range

armies.name: Akhelian Tide Guard
armies.playstyle: Fast with double eel units. King buffs saves; Reavers provide ranged pressure.

battleTraits.name: Royal Imperative
battleTraits.summary: Desperate to honour their liege, the Tide Guard strike a decisive blow. You can only use this ability in the third battle round. Effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round: Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST . Strike Sure: Friendly units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal)

regimentAbilities.name: The Spear Of Asphoren
regimentAbilities.summary: Those Idoneth who wish to follow the example of legendary commander Asphoren must strike at the foe like the surging tide

regimentAbilities.name: The Shield Of Ulchiss
regimentAbilities.summary: Mastery of the ebb and flow of battle is core to the teachings of Ulchiss, which state that a timely withdrawal can open up enemy vulnerabilities

enhancements.name: Dutiful Souls
enhancements.summary: The Tide Guard will fight to protect their King even when gravely wounded

enhancements.name: Voltaic Charge
enhancements.summary: This general’s weapons crackle with electric power, ready to be discharged. Effect: Your general’s Akhelian Royal Weapons have Charge (+1 Damage)

enhancements.name: Shimmering Amulet
enhancements.summary: This void-pearl amulet conceals its wearer behind a shimmering cloak of refracted magic. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 5+ )

enhancements.name: Soul Stealer
enhancements.summary: This warrior is said to siphon the spirits of fallen foes to sustain them in battle. Effect: If your general is in combat , Heal (D3) your general

armies.name: Glittering Phalanx
armies.playstyle: Hits hard but fragile. Rewards precise play; getting charged hurts.

battleTraits.name: Facets Of War
battleTraits.summary: The arts of war practised by the Lumineth are subtle, precise and devastating. Effect: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round. Pick 1 FACET OF WAR ability. That FACET OF WAR ability can be used this battle round but the other two cannot

battleTraits.name: Shining Company
battleTraits.summary: Numinous light shines from this aelven formation, bedazzling the foe. Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls that target friendly units

battleTraits.name: Power Of Hysh
battleTraits.summary: Vanari can use their innate arcane abilities to empower their sunmetal weapons

battleTraits.name: Lightning Reactions

regimentAbilities.summary: From out of caves and darkened lairs, a stream of ravening grots pours forth into the lurid light of the Bad Moon

regimentAbilities.name: The Hand Of Gork
regimentAbilities.summary: A bizarre ritual worked before the battle calls down a ghostly green hand that can carry a mob to where they are most needed

enhancements.name: Fight Another Day
enhancements.summary: Your general has mastered the ignoble art of striking then running away before the enemy can hit back

enhancements.name: Hallucinogenic Fungus Brew
enhancements.summary: Stolen from the shamans of the Gobbapalooza, this potent brew makes the imbiber almost impervious to pain. However, as the battle progresses, the effects start to wear off. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 4+ ) in the first battle round, WARD ( 5+ ) in the second battle round, and WARD ( 6+ ) in the third and fourth bat

enhancements.name: The Clammy Cowl
enhancements.summary: This enchanted hood wreathes its wearer in damp gloom, causing enemies to swing wildly at their blurred outline and weapons to slip in suddenly moistened palms. Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target your general

enhancements.name: Nightshade Mushroom
enhancements.summary: This black-capped fungus bursts into a cloud of pitch darkness when tossed into the air

armies.name: Snarlpack Huntaz
armies.playstyle: Movement 12" and retreat-and-charge tricks. Can lock the board if going first.

battleTraits.name: Fast As Frazzlegit
battleTraits.summary: The Gitmob packs are always on the move, a speeding melange of howling Snarlfangs and cackling grots. Effect: Friendly units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units by RETREAT abilities

regimentAbilities.name: Flankin' Force
regimentAbilities.summary: The Snarlboss has sent some of his warriors to sneakily outflank the enemy. Effect: Pick up to 2 friendly units. Remove them from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

regimentAbilities.name: Frazzleboom
regimentAbilities.summary: When a Sunsteala Wheela is destroyed, the metal shards hammered into it become unstable, burning nearby enemies as the Hyshian energies trapped within them are released. Effect: Each time a friendly WAR MACHINE is destroyed, before removing it from play, pick an enemy unit within 3" of that WAR MACHINE and roll a D3. O

enhancements.name: Kunnin' As A Snarlfang
enhancements.summary: This general knows the perfect time for the ladz to stab their enemies in the middle of a fight. Effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of the bearer

enhancements.name: Sunsteala Shard
enhancements.summary: This grot holds aloft a sliver of metal that absorbs ambient light, surrounding them in a patch of darkness that is perfect for the Gitmob to hide in. Effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units cannot be targeted by shooting attacks while they are wholly within 6" of this unit, unless the attacking unit is in com

enhancements.name: Glare Of Frazzlegit
enhancements.summary: With a yell, the Snarlboss releases the Hyshian light captured within his jaggedy blade

enhancements.name: Devious Backstabba
enhancements.summary: This grot has a scary number of shivs secreted about their body, and they are always ready to stab anyone who they think is too bossy

armies.name: Ironjawz Bigmob
armies.playstyle: Mass 3+ saves and -1 rend. Get stuck in and smash face.

battleTraits.name: We Go!
battleTraits.summary: The din of battle draws in Ironjawz from leagues around. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

battleTraits.name: Mighty Destroyers
battleTraits.summary: The Ironjawz won’t let anything get between them and a good scrap

regimentAbilities.name: Natural Disaster
regimentAbilities.summary: A mass of heavily armoured orruks hit an enemy line like a landslide if they gain enough momentum, leaving a trail of carnage and blazing ruin in their wake. Effect: If you make an unmodified charge roll of 8+ for a friendly unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn

regimentAbilities.name: A Proper Ruckus
regimentAbilities.summary: Delighted by the scrap before them, the orruks barge and jostle their way into the fray. Effect: All friendly units on the battlefield that were not set up this turn are the targets of that ability instead

enhancements.name: Amberbone Whetstone
enhancements.summary: This prized sharpening stone, laced with veins of realmstone, is found deep in the crags of Ghur. It is loved by the Ironjawz for its ability to make a weapon ‘ded sharp’. Effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons is 2

enhancements.name: Armour Of Gork
enhancements.summary: This bashed-together armour is thick, heavy and possessed of its own fierce fighting spirit. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 6+ )

enhancements.name: Trophy Skulls
enhancements.summary: Festooned with the skulls of those who crossed them, be they ferocious beast or mighty warrior, there’s no doubt that this orruk means business. Effect: Your general’s Control characteristic is 5

enhancements.name: Mega Bossy
enhancements.summary: This boss’s booming voice rings out across the battlefield, ‘encouraging’ their ladz to get krumpin’. Effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit

armies.name: Swampskulka Gang
armies.playstyle: Poisoned weapons and sneaky tricks. Different feel from Ironjawz.

regimentAbilities.name: Covered In Mud
regimentAbilities.summary: After some ‘hard finkin’, a group of orruks decides to slather themselves in muck so they can sneak up on the unwitting enemy

regimentAbilities.name: Noisy Racket
regimentAbilities.summary: On the eve of battle, the Kruleboyz make sure the enemy receives no respite as their war drums and rattle-skulls ring out into the night. Effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units in the first battle round

enhancements.name: Egomaniak
enhancements.summary: This self-important boss is willing to use anyone to protect his own hide. Effect: If any other friendly units are within your general’s combat range , before you allocate a damage point to your general, roll a dice. On a 4+, you must allocate that damage point to one of those units instead

enhancements.name: Kunnin' Plan
enhancements.summary: This devious Killaboss likes to feign retreat to draw their prey into a deadly trap

enhancements.name: Mork'S Eye Pebble
enhancements.summary: When rubbed, this darkgrey rock produces a swirling bank of thick fog that protects the bearer and their allies from harm. Effect: In the next shooting phase, friendly units have WARD ( 5+ ) while they are wholly within 12" of your general

enhancements.name: Eye-Biter Ash
enhancements.summary: Stored in a heat-proof pouch, this strange ash never stops smouldering. The bearer can cast it at a foe, creating a cloud of blistering ash that blinds the targets and causes them terrible pain

battleTraits.name: Kruleboyz Waaagh!
battleTraits.summary: In typically Morky fashion, Kruleboyz wait until they have the enemy surrounded before calling a Waaagh! – and when they do, the enemy’s fate is usually sealed

armies.name: Tyrant's Bellow
armies.playstyle: Good saves, brutal damage, surprising mobility. Dominates by turn 3–4.

battleTraits.name: Bellowing Arrival
battleTraits.summary: A mighty roar echoes across the battlefield as more hungry ogors join the fray. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units

regimentAbilities.name: Pulverising Girth
regimentAbilities.summary: There are few armies in the Mortal Realms that can withstand the charge of ravenous ogors

regimentAbilities.name: Bred For Toughness
regimentAbilities.summary: Ogors choose only the toughest and most thick-skinned beasts to carry them into battle. Effect: Add 1 to the Health characteristic of your Ironblaster and your Mournfang Pack unit

enhancements.name: Longstrider
enhancements.summary: This warrior is said to be capable of running down a sprinting rhinox. Effect: Your general has a Move characteristic of 8" instead of 6"

enhancements.name: Booming Roar
enhancements.summary: Relishing the fight, your general roars a challenge to the enemy that makes the very earth beneath their feet tremble. Effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units this phase while they are within 9" of your general

enhancements.name: Flask Of Stonehorn Blood
enhancements.summary: This icy-blue liquid imbues the one who drinks it with the toughness of a Stonehorn. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 3+ ) this phase

enhancements.name: Blubbergrub
enhancements.summary: These filthy and disturbingly large maggots are a favourite of the big beasties of the mawtribes

armies.name: Scrapglutt
armies.general: Mantrappers with 3 Gnoblar tokens, 1 Frost Sabre token and 1 Trap token
armies.playstyle: Consistent damage without Tyrant's Bellow's explosive peak.
roster: Mantrappers with 3 Gnoblar tokens, 1 Frost Sabre token and 1 Trap token

battleTraits.name: Let'S Get Stuck In
battleTraits.summary: The Ironguts start to arrive, and woe betide whoever gets in their way. Effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat

regimentAbilities.name: It'S A Hard Life
regimentAbilities.summary: It doesn't take much to become lunch when the leader of this Scrapglutt is around. The best the gnoblars can hope for is that someone else is gobbled up first

regimentAbilities.name: Frenzied Artillery
regimentAbilities.summary: The gnoblars of this Scrapglutt's Scraplauncher are known for getting a bit carried away. Effect: If the unmodified charge roll for a friendly Gnoblar Scraplauncher is 6+, add 3 the Attacks characteristic of the target’s Companion weapons for the rest of the turn

enhancements.name: Savage Instincts
enhancements.summary: As this ogor lays into the enemy, nearby allies can't help but get enthusiastic about the feast to come. Effect: Pick a friendly unit that has not used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within your general’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a FIGHT ability immediately after the FIGHT abilit

enhancements.name: Massive Bulk
enhancements.summary: Big, lumbering and nigh-on impossible to kill. Effect: Add 2 to the Health characteristic of your general

enhancements.name: Nasty Trap
enhancements.summary: Rusted and gnarled, the jaws of this iron trap mangle and snap the thickest bones with ease

enhancements.name: Veteran Hunter
enhancements.summary: This ogor hunter has a keen eye and even keener hunger, which combine to make him as dangerous as a sudden avalanche

armies.name: Wallsmasher Stomp
armies.playstyle: Few models but massive impact. Simple and devastating.

battleTraits.name: Bellowing Roar
battleTraits.summary: An ear-splitting bellow let loose by a Mancrusher can send the enemy battleline into disarray

battleTraits.name: Those Rocks And Chuck 'Em!'
battleTraits.summary: Your general commands their fellow gargants to hurl as many rocks at the enemy as they can

regimentAbilities.name: Foe-Chompers
regimentAbilities.summary: The Mancrushers hoist hapless enemies up into the air mid-battle, letting them tumble into their cavernous jaws before giving a mighty belch of satisfaction. Effect: Each time an enemy model is slain by a friendly unit’s ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, Heal (D3) that unit

regimentAbilities.name: Earth-Shaking Charge
regimentAbilities.summary: The ground shakes as the colossal gargants charge head-first into the fray

enhancements.name: Monstrously Tough
enhancements.summary: This greedy gargant always takes the juiciest spoils of battle and has an impressive gut as a result. Effect: Your general has a Health characteristic of 15 instead of 12

enhancements.name: Lanky Git
enhancements.summary: This long-legged gargant strides across the battlefield at a frightening pace. Effect: When you make a charge roll for your general, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6

enhancements.name: Extra-Big Bag
enhancements.summary: Made from the tattered remains of enemy banners, even more screaming warriors can be stuffed into this large and garish bag. Effect: When your general uses their ‘Stuff ’Em In Me Bag’ ability, you can pick 2 enemy units instead of 1 (roll for each)

enhancements.name: Furiously Territorial
enhancements.summary: Nothing infuriates this gargant more than pipsqueaks laying claim to the lands around them. Effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by your general that target an enemy unit that is contesting an objective you do not control

armies.name: Carrion Retainers
armies.playstyle: Delusion mechanics and 6+ ward. Sneaky objective grabs.

battleTraits.name: Noble Deeds
battleTraits.summary: Each member of a ghoulish court is constantly seeking to prove their valour by performing worthy exploits on the battlefield. Effect: Each time a friendly HERO uses a FIGHT ability , after its attacks have been resolved, give that HERO a number of noble deeds points equal to the number of damage points allocated by tha

battleTraits.name: Feeding Frenzy
battleTraits.summary: To witness an abhorrant at war spurs a mad hunger in the ghouls Effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly HEROES that have 6 noble deeds points

battleTraits.name: Summon Loyal Subjects
battleTraits.summary: Ghouls flock to their vampiric masters

regimentAbilities.name: Crusading Army
regimentAbilities.summary: The warriors of this court see themselves a crusading paladins venturing out into the realms with a holy cause. Effect: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units

regimentAbilities.name: Defenders Of The Realm
regimentAbilities.summary: These deluded ghouls see themselves as noble defenders, selling their lives dearly to drive back the invader from beyond. Effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units that are contesting an objective you control

enhancements.name: Ulguan Cloak
enhancements.summary: This Archregent is shrouded by an aura of darkness – holiness, as they would see it – which makes them difficult to target. Effect: Your general is not visible to enemy models that are more than 12" away from them

enhancements.name: Rousing Oration
enhancements.summary: The Archregent looses a soul-chilling howl, which is perceived as an inspiring call to gallantry by their deranged followers. Effect: Roll a dice for each friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. Do not roll a dice for your general. For each 5+, give 1 noble deeds point to your general

enhancements.name: Blood-River Chalice
enhancements.summary: The Archregent guzzles from a bloodstained chalice, roaring as their deathless form swells with restored vitality. Effect: Heal (2D3) your general

enhancements.name: Crimson Victuals
enhancements.summary: Hissing an incantation, the Archregent saps the life essence of nearby foes

armies.name: Charnel Watch
armies.playstyle: Random delusions and hard-hitting charges. Fragile but fun.

battleTraits.name: Delusions And Madness
battleTraits.summary: The Flesh‑eaters’ delusions can change on a whim

battleTraits.name: Delusion Of The Great Feast
battleTraits.summary: In victory’s wake, the ghouls gorge upon their ‘bounty’…

battleTraits.name: Delusion Of The Knightly Host
battleTraits.summary: The earth shakes and the sky screams as the ghouls charge. Effect: While you believe this DELUSION , if the unmodified charge roll for a friendly HERO or KNIGHTS unit is 8+, add 1 to hit rolls for that unit’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn

regimentAbilities.name: Delusion Of The Sentinel
regimentAbilities.summary: Convinced that they are the last line of defence, the ghouls fight on with a shrieking grit. Effect: While you believe this DELUSION , add 1 to ward rolls for friendly units while each model in the unit is contesting an objective

regimentAbilities.name: Delusion Of The Hunter
regimentAbilities.summary: The ghouls opt to pounce on trespassers rather than hold ground. Effect: While you believe this DELUSION , add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while no models in the unit are contesting an objective

enhancements.name: Almost Lucid
enhancements.summary: This vampire has just enough sanity to faintly manipulate their madness. Effect: You can re-roll the delusion roll

enhancements.name: A Worthy Challenge
enhancements.summary: The pinnacle of chivalry is a noble duel between virtuous warriors

enhancements.name: Companion Of The Hunt
enhancements.summary: This vampire has oft excelled in their monarch’s hunting parties. Effect: If your general is not in combat , they can move 3". They cannot move into combat during any part of that move

enhancements.name: Choirmaster
enhancements.summary: The shrieks of this Gorewarden further bolster the howls of their Crypt Flayers

armies.name: Slasher Host
armies.playstyle: Charge potential and objective harassment. Lacks staying power.

battleTraits.name: Wave Of Terror
battleTraits.summary: Many foes freeze in fear when faced by a swarming Nighthaunt charge

battleTraits.name: Ethereal
battleTraits.summary: Nighthaunt spirits can only be harmed by blows delivered with great conviction. Effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for friendly units (positive and negative)

regimentAbilities.name: Death Stalkers
regimentAbilities.summary: These spectral killers relentlessly hunt down quarry whose names have been whispered to them in darksome rites

regimentAbilities.name: Chorus Of Terror
regimentAbilities.summary: Warriors are frozen in place by the shrieks of the Nighthaunt as they wash over the enemy lines in a wave of terror. Effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target a friendly unit that charged in the same turn

enhancements.name: Soulfire Ring
enhancements.summary: Gouts of lashing green flames leap forth from this ring as it consumes the souls of those slain by the wearer. Effect: If any models were slain by your general this turn, Heal (D6) your general

enhancements.name: Beacon Of Nagashizzar
enhancements.summary: This malignant light summons departed souls. Effect: Return 1 slain model to each friendly unit on the battlefield

enhancements.name: Cloaked In Shadow
enhancements.summary: Eerily intangible, this spirit’s ethereal form fades in and out of existence like some wispy cloud of supernatural mist. Effect: No more than 1 enemy unit can target your general with attacks (shooting or combat) per phase

enhancements.name: Shadow'S Edge
enhancements.summary: It is impossible to tell if this ebon blade is corporeal or mere shadow, yet its touch tears through flesh and bone with ease. Effect: Your general ’s Sword of Stolen Hours has Crit (Mortal)

armies.name: Cursed Shacklehorde
armies.playstyle: Many units, Fly everywhere, 5+ ward. Hit-and-fade with resilience.

battleTraits.name: Cackling Arrival
battleTraits.summary: Whether diving from the skies or rising suddenly from the very ground, a host of gheists catches the foe unaware

battleTraits.name: Ethereal
battleTraits.summary: Nighthaunt spirits can rarely be harmed by blows delivered by those caught in the grip of a spiritual terror. Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly units

regimentAbilities.name: Discorporate
regimentAbilities.summary: If given the order, the Nighthaunt can flicker between the realms of the living and dead

regimentAbilities.name: Mounting Dread
regimentAbilities.summary: The wails and shrieks of the Nighthaunt are a continuous assault on the courage of those who face them in battle

enhancements.name: Unholy Visage
enhancements.summary: Even the mightiest feel a glimmer of fear in the face of this creature's unutterably foul appearance

enhancements.name: Deathly Possessor
enhancements.summary: In a flash of balefire, the Nighthaunt vanishes. An instant later, a nearby foe's eyes glow with spectral power and they lash out at their allies, cackling in a voice not their own

enhancements.name: Tales Of Horror
enhancements.summary: Desertions are all too common when battling this spectral terror

enhancements.name: Spectral Howl
enhancements.summary: A soul-shattering howl pierces the din of battle, rooting the enemy in place

armies.name: Tithe-Reaper Echelon
armies.playstyle: Synergy between units. Grinds through sheer resilience.

battleTraits.name: Contingent Arrival
battleTraits.summary: Marching in perfect unison, a reinforcing unit of Mortek Guard arrives. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units

regimentAbilities.name: Impenetrable Ranks
regimentAbilities.summary: If given the order, Ossiarch warriors will snap into an unyielding defensive line

regimentAbilities.name: Re-Form Ranks
regimentAbilities.summary: A group of Bonereapers swiftly disengages from combat with flawless precision

enhancements.name: Empower Nadirite Weapons
enhancements.summary: Soulreaper can call upon stolen life essence to bolster nadirite weapons

enhancements.name: Murderous Drive
enhancements.summary: This Soulreaper is animated by especially vicious and warlike spirits. Effect: Your general ’s Soulreaper Scythe has Crit (2 Hits)

enhancements.name: Unstoppable Commander
enhancements.summary: This Soulreaper’s animus contains the essence of a brilliant commander that can still urge their troops to victory

enhancements.name: Nadirite Assault
enhancements.summary: The weapons of the Ossiarch legions can siphon souls with a single cut, stealing the foe’s life force. Effect: Until the end of the phase, this unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits)

armies.name: Mortisan Elite
armies.playstyle: Powerful support pieces. Fragile if key heroes are removed.

battleTraits.name: Dread Descent
battleTraits.summary: There are fewer more unwelcome sights to an enemy than the arrival of one of the Great Necromancer's heralds. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

battleTraits.name: Relentless Discipline
battleTraits.summary: The Ossiarchs are infamous for their cohesive discipline

regimentAbilities.name: Peerless Cohesion
regimentAbilities.summary: With coordination that would be the envy of any mortal commander, the Ossiarch Bonereapers act in effortless tandem. Effect: You can use the ’ Relentless Discipline ’ ability for a second time this phase but you must pick a different target to the one you picked the first time

regimentAbilities.name: Immaculate Generalship
regimentAbilities.summary: The Ossiarch Bonereapers instantly understand the intent of their commander and seamlessly move to act upon it. Effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls you make

enhancements.name: Shard Storm
enhancements.summary: The caster conjures forth a great cloud of bone-shards and hurls them at the foe

enhancements.name: Lode Of Saturation
enhancements.summary: This ingot of nadirite-iron alloy, when pressed against a bone construct, renders its structure nigh invulnerable. Effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for combat attacks that target this general

enhancements.name: Mend Constructs
enhancements.summary: The caster seeks to undo the damage that mars the surface of their creations

enhancements.name: Helm Of Tyranny
enhancements.summary: This helm radiates the oppressive will of the wearer, filling nearby foes with supernatural dread

armies.name: Kavalo's Vanguard
armies.playstyle: Free retreats, Fly, and charge-blocking. Wins through movement control.

battleTraits.name: Calculated Feint
battleTraits.summary: To the Ossiarch legions, battle is but a plan to be enacted, each part meticulously choreographed down to the last detail. Effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly CAVALRY units by RETREAT abilities

battleTraits.name: Kavalos Lance
battleTraits.summary: These warriors form the tip of the spear, crashing through enemy formations with terrifying ease

regimentAbilities.name: Feigned Retreat
regimentAbilities.summary: At an unseen and unheard signal, the Kavalos Vanguard pivots effortlessly from one engagement to another. Effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units can use CHARGE abilities even if they used a RETREAT ability in the same turn

regimentAbilities.name: Reinforced Constructs
regimentAbilities.summary: These mastercrafted Bonereapers were created by some of the finest bone-sculptors of the Ossiarch Empire

enhancements.name: Mighty Archaeossian
enhancements.summary: The fossilised bone from which this commander is formed is supernaturally hard. Effect: Your general has WARD ( 5+ )

enhancements.name: Imperious Commander
enhancements.summary: This general is unforgiving of failure, and their demands are met with incredible swiftness

enhancements.name: Murderous Blade
enhancements.summary: Said to have been wielded by Patru Zandtos before he took up the Dark Lance, this blade is utterly lethal. Effect: Your general ’s Commander’s Blade has Crit (2 Hits)

enhancements.name: Cold Savagery
enhancements.summary: Perhaps tainted by beast-bone, this commander infects their troops with more than a hint of ferocity

armies.name: Bloodcrave Hunt
armies.playstyle: Excellent mobility, recursion, and objective control.

battleTraits.name: Swoop Down
battleTraits.summary: The sky darkens as the Vargheists descend. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

battleTraits.name: The Hunger
battleTraits.summary: Those who bear the Soulblight Curse constantly crave blood and are empowered by feasting upon their foes. Effect: Each time a friendly VAMPIRE unit uses a FIGHT ability , after all of its attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) that VAMPIRE unit where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks

regimentAbilities.name: Endless Legions
regimentAbilities.summary: To the Soulblight aristocracy, the dead are mere chattel to be expended at will

regimentAbilities.name: Ruinous Chargers
regimentAbilities.summary: The Blood Knights of this army leave a trail of destruction as they trample anything that lies between them and their prey

enhancements.name: Grave-Sand Shard
enhancements.summary: By crushing this gem of vitrified grave-sand, the Vampire Lord can draw upon a surge of death magic to reinvigorate their resurrected warriors. Effect: Add 1 to each legion roll made for that unit

enhancements.name: Aura Of Night
enhancements.summary: This black leather brigandine was crafted from the hide of an abyssal stalker and grants the wearer that creature’s shadowy aura. Effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for shooting attacks that target your general

enhancements.name: Cloud Of Bats
enhancements.summary: Your Vampire Lord dissolves into a swarm of bats before reappearing elsewhere. Effect: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units

enhancements.name: Spirit Gale
enhancements.summary: Your general calls forth spectral winds that tear the souls of the foe from their bodies

armies.name: Deathrattle Tomb Host
armies.playstyle: Defensive with reinforcements. Wight King must stay near troops for 5+ ward.

battleTraits.name: The Rising Dead
battleTraits.summary: Clawing their way through the soil and rock, more undead warriors join the fight. Effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units

battleTraits.name: Aura Of Antiquity
battleTraits.summary: Prolonged exposure to the necrotic energies that animate these Deathrattle warriors can cause the equipment of their foes to corrode and crumble with unnatural speed

regimentAbilities.name: Overwhelming Hordes
regimentAbilities.summary: The relentless advance of these skeletal undead can overwhelm even the most tenacious resistance. Effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly non- HERO units that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit

regimentAbilities.name: Deathmarch
regimentAbilities.summary: With rusted armour clattering, the skeletons advance in eerie lockstep, unburdened by pain or doubt

enhancements.name: Shyishan Blade
enhancements.summary: Sorcerous shadows dance across the deadly sharp edge of this obsidian sword. Effect: The Rend characteristic of your general ’s Baleful Tomb Blade is 2

enhancements.name: Propelled By Hate
enhancements.summary: This warrior’s insatiable urge to slaughter the enemies of Nagash drives their deathless soldiers forward with sudden haste

enhancements.name: Stolen Animus
enhancements.summary: This Wight King draws their unholy vitality from spilling blood in great measure. Effect: Each time your general scores a critical hit , Heal (2) your general after the ATTACK ability has been resolved

enhancements.name: Soul-Drain Pendant
enhancements.summary: When the cursed words of awakening are uttered, this amethyst pendant saps the vigour of the living

matchSteps.title: Choose Spearhead Armies
matchSteps.summary: Each player picks their faction and the Spearhead box they brought today.
matchSteps.body: Spearhead armies are fixed box-set rosters — you cannot change unit composition. Many factions have multiple Spearhead options with different playstyles. Pick the army each player is fielding today.
tips: Your box includes unit rules cards — use those at the table.
Check which Spearhead box your models came from if you're unsure.

matchSteps.title: Roll for Attacker & Defender
matchSteps.summary: Roll off — winner picks attacker or defender.
matchSteps.body: Roll off to determine who picks attacker and defender. The attacker picks regiment abilities and enhancements first, then the defender. The defender also chooses which realm side of the battlefield to fight on.
tips: Round 1 first turn is a separate priority roll on the Battle tab — not the same as picking attacker.
Consider your army's strengths when choosing attacker vs defender.

matchSteps.title: Regiment ability (pick one army rule)
matchSteps.summary: Attacker picks first, then defender — one army-wide rule each.
matchSteps.body: Each Spearhead army sheet lists two regiment abilities. This is not a unit group on the table — pick one pre-battle rule for your whole army. The attacker picks first, then the defender.
tips: Some abilities counter specific opponents — study the enemy army before choosing.
Passive abilities are reliable; once-per-battle abilities can be game-swinging.

matchSteps.title: Pick general enhancements
matchSteps.summary: Attacker picks first — one upgrade card for your general only.
matchSteps.body: Each army has four enhancement cards for its general. The attacker picks one, then the defender. Enhancements upgrade your general only — protect them accordingly.
tips: Ward enhancements help fragile generals survive longer.
Offensive enhancements can turn your general into a linchpin — but losing them hurts.

matchSteps.title: Set Up the Battlefield
matchSteps.summary: Defender chooses board and side; terrain, objectives, deploy armies.
matchSteps.body:
Deployment is the last step before round 1. The defender chooses which Spearhead battlefield you are using — Fire and Jade (Aqshy or Ghyran), Sand and Bone (Ossia or Dolorum), or City of Ash (Ashen Bastion or Shattered Crossroads) — and which side of that board to fight on. Each side has its own deployment map and twist deck, so match the deck to the side you pick.

Next, set up terrain: two large and two small features, spread across the board without blocking deployment zones or objectives. Objectives are already printed on the board — the whole circle counts when contesting, not just the centre symbol.

Deploy armies within the shaded zones on the deployment map, defender first then alternating. Before the first turn, resolve any once-per-battle deployment abilities on your army sheets (for example, Skaven hiding a unit in the tunnels below).
tips: Use the coin flip in the checklist below if neither player cares which side you play on.
Fire and Jade is the classic Spearhead board; Sand and Bone and City of Ash add new maps and twists.
Check both army sheets for Deployment Phase abilities — they are easy to forget in a first game.
The whole objective circle counts, not just the centre symbol.

matchSteps.title: Fight the Battle
matchSteps.summary: Play 4 battle rounds — score victory points to win.
matchSteps.body: Deploy armies, then play exactly four battle rounds (~60–90 minutes). Each round: priority roll, identify underdog, draw twist card, draw battle tactic cards, then alternate turns. Score VP for objectives and completed battle tactics.
tips: Twist cards favour the underdog — comebacks are built in.
Each battle tactic card offers a tactic OR a command — not both.
